title: NEW BABY GIFTS - 211info
text: BAMBINOS OREGON NEW BABY GIFTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a new baby gift basket that includes a handmade quilt or crocheted blanket, laundry detergent, diaper cream, baby shampoo, a baby outfit, diapers, wipes, a Bambino's tote, and other useful items. Specific items are based on current availability. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: -Low-income expectant mothers 32 weeks or further along with limited outside support -Age 0-3 months: Must meet all other program requirements Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Tuesday 12pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-4618 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Main Street Plaza, lower level. Next door to Food Bank. Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Laundry Products * Infants/Toddlers Personal/Grooming Supplies * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS SUPPLIES PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD SAFETY EQUIPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAMBINOS OREGON
